productDisplayName: Nike Men Green Braata LR Premium Casual Shoes
description: Style Note A shoe with urban flair and casual style, this nike Braata shoe is a good looking pair. Your shoe closet absolutely needs this casual essential. Perfect for college wear or coffee dates, you can style this with a tonal monochrome tee. Product Details Green blunt toed shoe with no overlays and central lace-ups Nike swoosh at the backfoot PU midsole with foxing Exaggerated herringbone grooves in the TPU outsole Material and Care Canvas Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
